nodes.name: Sharper Choppas
nodes.effect: All melee weapons +10% damage (total +35% with faction passive). Melee attack speed +5%.
nodes.notes: Hit harder, hit faster — the foundational Horde doctrine

nodes.name: Rage Fuel
nodes.effect: At <30% HP: +20% damage, +15% attack speed (berserker state). Unit cannot voluntarily retreat while active.
nodes.notes: Low-HP units become MORE dangerous — planned attrition fuel

nodes.name: Wreckage Salvage Optimization
nodes.effect: Scrap Stack collection radius +10m (total 40m from 30m). Stack bonus: +4% armor, +3% damage (up from +3%/+2%).
nodes.notes: DIRECT upgrade to primary mechanic — more range, bigger bonus per stack

nodes.name: WAAAGH! Fervor
nodes.effect: First enemy kill each battle: all Horde units +15% damage, +10% speed for 8 seconds. Once per battle.
nodes.notes: First blood triggers faction-wide frenzy — timing the first kill matters

nodes.name: WAAAGH! Momentum
nodes.effect: WAAAGH! buff persists until the Horde takes a casualty. +30% damage, +15% speed. Each kill refreshes the timer.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — snowball until one casualty breaks the streak

nodes.name: Thicker Plates
nodes.effect: All armor equipment +10% HP. Scrap Plate and Looted Composite receive additional +5% HP on top.
nodes.notes: Another welded layer — direct durability baseline

nodes.name: Spiked Everything
nodes.effect: Spiked Armor reflected damage 15%→25%. All vehicles gain +5% melee contact reflection.
nodes.notes: Touching the Horde in melee becomes increasingly inadvisable

nodes.name: Looted Systems Integration
nodes.effect: Cross-faction looted equipment effectiveness 75%→90%. Random jam chance 8%→3%.
nodes.notes: Stolen tech works better — Mek-Boys learn from experience

nodes.name: Ablative Wreckage Layering
nodes.effect: Unlocks Ablative Wreckage armor (+25% HP, first 5 hits absorbed by wreckage layer). All vehicles +15% HP passive.
nodes.notes: The battlefield itself becomes armor — turn Scrap Stacks into literal plating

nodes.name: Nuclear Scrap-Forging
nodes.effect: Unlocks Nuclear Scrap Bomb equipment. Irradiated wreckage produces +35% HP plating. All units +10% radiation resistance.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — junk becomes weapons-grade material

nodes.name: Bigger Trukks
nodes.effect: Scrap-Trukk capacity +4 (to 12 Brutes). All Horde vehicle movement speed +5%.
nodes.notes: More bodies, faster delivery — core Horde logistics

nodes.name: Basic Rekon
nodes.effect: Unlocks basic Recon actions for Horde (normally unavailable). Intel cost: 0 (Brutes scout for free).
nodes.notes: Crude but free intelligence — the Horde stumbles onto useful information

nodes.name: Factory Overdrive
nodes.effect: War Factory production speed +25%. Advanced War Factory +15%. Unit Scrap cost −10%.
nodes.notes: Mass production flood — replace casualties faster than the enemy kills them

nodes.name: Salvage Logistics
nodes.effect: +3⚙ Scrap flat bonus per battle won. Tether-Barge processing efficiency +30%.
nodes.notes: Profit from every fight — war is a resource-generating activity

nodes.name: Da Grand Plan
nodes.effect: General auto-resolve +15%. COMBINED OPERATIONS: two Horde Generals can assault one target simultaneously. Standing orders improved.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — rare strategic coherence from the least strategic faction

nodes.name: Scrap Innovation
nodes.effect: Battlefield salvage equipment rolls +10% quality. 15% chance to generate a bonus Common item after each battle.
nodes.notes: Find useful junk more often — luck of the scrap heap

nodes.name: War-God Idol Activation
nodes.effect: Unlocks War-God Idol production. 5 cycles at Advanced War Factory. +15% damage Waaagh!-Caller aura on deployment.
nodes.notes: Walking shrine — 30 crew, 12 meters of mobile violence

nodes.name: Asteroid-Fortress Construction
nodes.effect: Unlocks Asteroid-Fortress flagship. Requires capturable asteroid node + Shipyard + 7 cycles.
nodes.notes: 800m diameter of rock, guns, and fury

nodes.name: Reverse-Engineered Acid
nodes.effect: Unlocks Acid-Dipped ammo (+25% vs Vorax). All Horde weapons +5% damage-over-time duration.
nodes.notes: Vorax biology weaponized against the Vorax — poetic

nodes.name: Da Biggest Gun
nodes.effect: Asteroid-Fortress gains Da Big Gun: deals 50% of target's max HP as direct damage per shot, regardless of armor. Once per battle. Recoils Fortress 200m.
nodes.notes: CULMINATION — one shot, one problem solved. Probably.
